Our Cleaning Services

Standard Cleaning

Dusting, vacuuming, mopping, trash empty, kitchen counter wipe-down, bathroom sanitization. Perfect for keeping homes and offices neat weekly.

Deep Cleaning

Detail cleaning including skirting boards, window frames, inside microwave, door handles, limescale removal, grout scrubbing, and mattress dusting.

Move-In / Move-Out

Comprehensive preparation clean for tenancy handovers. Includes inside oven, fridge, kitchen cupboards, drawers, window sills, and heavy steam vacuums.

Frequently Asked Questions

How does the real-time checklist and GPS check-in work?
Every cleaner is required to scan a QR code at your premises and clock in via GPS. They tick off checklist items room-by-room, upload before/after photos, and you receive real-time notifications in your client portal.
What is your cancellation and rescheduling policy?
Rescheduling is free up to 24 hours before your booking. Within 24 hours, a $30 late fee applies to cover staff travel bookings. Cancellations trigger refunds according to your site subscription tier.
Are the cleaners insured and background-checked?
Yes, 100% of SparkMate professionals undergo identity check verify, training courses, and criminal check validation. They are fully bonded and insured.
